caption: The video appears to be an educational lecture on Cryogenic Engineering, specifically focusing on the concept of "Figure of Merit (FOM)." The slides shown are part of a presentation by Prof. M D Atrey from the Department of Mechanical Engineering at IIT Bombay, as indicated by the text at the bottom of the screen. The first two frames display a blank slide with the title "Figure of Merit (FOM)" prominently at the top, suggesting that the professor is likely introducing or explaining this concept. The NPTEL logo in the bottom left corner indicates that this lecture is part of the National Programme on Technology Enhanced Learning, which provides free online courses and lectures. The cursor visible in the first frame suggests that the presenter may be using it to navigate through the slides or highlight specific points during the lecture.
